Subject: Houston Angel Network - October Breakfast Meeting
Message:
The Houston Technology Center
cordially invites you to attend the
 

HOUSTON ANGEL NETWORK
OCTOBER BREAKFAST MEETING

 
Wednesday, October 17, 2001
 
Networking/Registration:  7:00 - 7:30 a.m. 
Breakfast/Presentations:  7:30 - 9:00 a.m.
 
The Houstonian
111 North Post Oak Lane
 
Please R.S.V.P. to Kathy Nethercutt: knethercutt@houstontech.org 
or call (713) 658-1750 no later than October 12, 2001. 
Price to attend is $ 30.
 Please pay in advance with check or credit card.
